testimonials.description: Real reviews from our community, people who love slow mornings, quality, matcha, and a little joy from Japan.

items.review: The quality blew me away, rich, smooth, and nothing like supermarket matcha. This is now my daily ritual.
Ordered the Sakura Matcha and I'm obsessed. The packaging is so cute and the flavor is so smooth!
The matcha aesthetic is everything. Cute packaging, great quality. My morning routine is so much better now.
I bought a tin for myself and ended up ordering two more as gifts. It feels premium without being fussy.
Creamy, vibrant, and easy to whisk. It genuinely made me slow down and enjoy breakfast again.
Every detail feels intentional, from the color to the taste. The whole experience feels calm and elevated.

hero.description: A lifestyle concept store inspired by the little joys of everyday life, with matcha at the heart of everything we do.
hero.imageAlt: Iced matcha drink representing the Blachh lifestyle concept

why.title: Matcha first, then a whole world around it.
paragraphs: Blachh.co started by bringing carefully curated products from Asia to Europe, with matcha at the center of the brand. What began as a love for quality matcha slowly grew into something more: a community.

Our world is for people who love slow moments, books, cute aesthetics like Monchhichi, and a feel-good lifestyle. From time to time, we also host matcha pop-ups so people can come by, taste, and experience the quality of our matcha in person.
why.quote: More than a store, Blachh is a cozy community where matcha, creativity, and good energy come together.

craft.imageTitle: Lifestyle and daily rituals, books and self-care, fun and friends.
craft.imageAlt: Lifestyle flat lay with books, beauty items, and matcha products
craft.title: Made for aesthetic-driven matcha lovers and everyday joy.
craft.description: Blachh speaks to Millennials and Gen Z who care about lifestyle, self-care, books, and cute details as much as they care about matcha. Alongside matcha powder from Japan and beyond, we curate skincare, vitamins, self-care products, books, and Monchhichi pieces that fit that world.

cta.title: Be part of our community, matcha and joy.
cta.description: We are currently online-based in Sweden and ship across Europe.

items.label: Description
paragraphs: Grown in the misty mountains of Kagoshima, this first harvest matcha is crafted from Okumidori and Saemidori cultivars. With its deep umami, smooth texture, and hints of hinoki forest, it brings clarity and calm to your day.
Its profile stays smooth and balanced in a straight whisked bowl, with enough depth to feel layered without turning bitter.
This is the kind of matcha that works well as an everyday ritual pick when you want clarity, sweetness, and a clean texture.

items.label: Brewing notes
paragraphs: Sift 1 to 2 teaspoons into a warm bowl to remove clumps and keep the final texture even.
Add a small amount of water around 75 to 80 degrees Celsius, then whisk in quick zig-zag motions until a fine foam forms.
For a lighter cup, use more water. For a richer cup, keep the water lower and whisk for a denser body.

items.label: Storage
paragraphs: Keep the tin sealed tightly and store it somewhere cool, dry, and away from direct sunlight.
Once opened, avoid heat and moisture exposure so the color and aroma stay fresh for longer.
For best flavor, finish the tin within a few weeks of opening and let it return to room temperature before use if chilled.

items.title: The best daily matcha
items.body: Smooth, vibrant, and naturally sweet with no bitterness. I drink it every morning and it sets the tone for a calm and focused day.
items.name: Sophie L.

items.title: Beautifully balanced
items.body: The umami is deep and rounded, and the finish stays clean. It feels refined without being too delicate for everyday drinking.
items.name: Marcus T.

items.title: Soft and grounding
items.body: There is a calm forest note in this that really stands out. The texture is silky and the sweetness comes through naturally.
items.name: Elin R.

items.title: Worth the ritual
items.body: Whisks easily, looks vivid in the bowl, and stays smooth even when I make it slightly stronger. Easily one of my favorites.
items.name: Daniel K.

items.title: Very easy to love
items.body: No harsh edge, just a steady umami and a mellow finish. It gives me a focused start without feeling too intense.
items.name: Ava M.
